message:
feat(FJ-P2C-004-E): comprehensive unit + property test suite for dispatch runtime

31 tests in dispatch_p2c004_suite.rs covering 6 categories:
- Transform dispatch (jit/grad/vmap/compositions/invalid)
- Gradient accuracy (polynomial, trig, numerical vs analytical)
- Effect tokens (empty, duplicates, single/triple transform signals)
- Cache integration (determinism, key differentiation, strict/hardened)
- Evidence ledger (entry presence, signal completeness, decision ID)
- Property tests (dispatch determinism, cache stability, JIT identity,
  grad correctness, ledger population — 256+ cases each)

370+ workspace tests pass. Clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
